info.name: GP Payment Orchestration API
info.description: Payment orchestration platform API. Includes OAuth token generation, merchant-facing mobile money endpoints (protected), and admin management APIs for fee profiles, payment channels, transaction types, subscriptions, providers, merchant API keys, IPs, and more. Payment channels are now linked directly to subscriptions instead of payment services.

item.name: Auth - OAuth
item.description: Public OAuth endpoint for generating merchant bearer tokens. Uses x-www-form-urlencoded.

item.name: Merchant API - Mobile Money
item.description: Protected merchant endpoints under /api/v1. Requires Authorization: Bearer <token> and X-Client-ID headers.

header.description: Required unique reference for this transaction

request.description: Initiate a mobile money collection (async). Responds 202 Accepted. Phone number must be exactly 12 digits (e.g. 256701234567).

header.description: Required unique reference for this transaction
Required HMAC auth signature for disbursements

request.description: Synchronous disbursement. Requires X-Auth-Signature header. Phone number must be exactly 12 digits.
Poll the status of a collection transaction by its reference.
Retrieve the merchant's collection account balance.
Poll the status of a disbursement transaction by its reference.
Retrieve the merchant's float/disbursement account balance. Requires X-Auth-Signature.
Create a hosted checkout session. (Implementation in progress)

item.name: Admin - Fee Profiles
item.description: Manage fee profiles: name, code, payment channel, transaction type, charge amounts and calculation modes.

item.name: Admin - Providers
item.description: Manage payment providers (e.g., Airtel, MTN, Zamtel). Payment channels link to providers and subscriptions.

item.name: Admin - Payment Channels
item.description: Manage payment channels (e.g. MTN Collection, Airtel Disbursement). Linked to a provider, subscription, and transaction type.

item.name: Admin - Transaction Types
item.description: Manage transaction types (Collection, Disbursement) and sub-transaction types.

item.name: Admin - Merchant Fee Profiles
item.description: Assign fee profiles to specific merchants.

item.name: Admin - Channel Fee Bands
item.description: Define fee bands per payment channel (tiered provider fees based on amount ranges).

item.name: Admin - Profile Fee Bands
item.description: Define tiered fee bands within a fee profile (amount-range based charges).

item.name: Admin - Prefixes
item.description: Manage phone number prefixes and their mapped payment channels.

item.name: Admin - Subscriptions
item.description: Manage subscription plans and merchant subscription assignments.

item.name: Admin - Merchant Payment Channels
item.description: Assign and manage payment channels available to specific merchants.

item.name: Admin - Merchant API Keys
item.description: Manage merchant OAuth credentials (client_id / client_secret), auth signatures, and PINs.

request.description: Generates client_id and client_secret for a merchant.
Generate an HMAC auth signature for use in disbursement requests (X-Auth-Signature header).
Set or reset the merchant's disbursement PIN.

item.name: Admin - Merchant IPs
item.description: Manage whitelisted IP addresses for merchant API access.
